What We Do

Complete Pest Control Solutions

From one-time knockout treatments to year-round prevention plans — we handle every pest that calls Upstate New York home.

🐜

Ant Control

Carpenter ants destroying your wood? Pavement ants invading your kitchen? We eliminate colonies at the source and seal entry points.

Learn More →
🐭

Rodent Control

Mice and rats in your walls, attic, or garage. We trap, exclude, and prevent rodents from getting comfortable in your home.

Learn More →
🛏️

Bed Bug Treatment

Fast-moving infestations require disciplined response. We offer heat treatments and chemical solutions to eliminate every life stage.

Learn More →
🦟

Mosquito Control

Reclaim your yard. Seasonal barrier spray treatments knock down mosquito populations so you can enjoy the outdoors again.

Learn More →
🏠

Termite Inspection & Treatment

Silent destroyers working 24/7 inside your walls. We catch them early and protect your home with proven treatment systems.

Learn More →
🦝

Wildlife Removal

Raccoons, skunks, squirrels, groundhogs — we humanely trap and relocate wildlife and seal up entry points to keep them out.

Learn More →
🐝

Wasp & Bee Removal

Yellowjackets and bald-faced hornets build nests fast. We remove them safely and treat areas to prevent re-nesting.

Learn More →
🕷️

Spider Control

Wolf spiders, cellar spiders, and more. Interior and exterior perimeter treatments keep spiders from taking over your home.

Learn More →
🛡️

Prevention Plans

Monthly, bi-monthly, and quarterly maintenance plans that stop infestations before they start. Best value for homeowners.

Learn More →
Serving All of Upstate New YorkFrom Albany to the Adirondacks
Why Sasquatch

Built for
Tough NY
Properties

  • 01

    Licensed & Fully Insured

    Every technician is New York State certified and our work is fully insured. You're protected from the moment we arrive.

  • 02

    24-Hour Emergency Response

    Pest emergencies don't wait for business hours. We offer rapid response scheduling for urgent infestations.

  • 03

    Eco-Friendly Treatment Options

    We offer family- and pet-safe treatment options that are tough on pests and gentle on your home environment.

  • 04

    100% Satisfaction Guaranteed

    If pests come back between scheduled treatments, so do we — at no extra charge. That's the Sasquatch promise.

Expert Inspections
Upstate NY Terrain
Home Protection
Professional Treatment
Happy Customers
How It Works

Simple Process, Serious Results

01

Free Estimate

Contact us and we'll schedule a free inspection. No pressure, no hidden fees — just an honest assessment.

02

Expert Inspection

Our certified technician identifies the pest, severity, entry points, and recommends the right treatment plan.

03

Targeted Treatment

We execute the treatment plan efficiently using professional-grade products selected for your specific situation.

04

Prevention & Follow-Up

We seal entry points, provide prevention tips, and follow up to ensure the job is done right — guaranteed.

Real Reviews

Upstate NY Homeowners Trust Sasquatch

★★★★★

We had a massive carpenter ant problem in our 1940s home in Saratoga Springs. Sasquatch came out the next morning, found the colony in our basement joists, and treated it completely. Professional from start to finish.

MR
Melissa R.Saratoga Springs, NY
★★★★★

Our Albany backyard was completely taken over by mosquitoes. After one seasonal treatment from Sasquatch, we could actually sit outside again. Kids played out there all summer. Totally worth it.

JT
James T.Albany, NY
★★★★★

Found bed bugs in my Utica rental property. Called Sasquatch and they moved fast — heat treatment the following week, all units cleared. They gave me a prevention checklist too. Five stars, hands down.

DK
Denise K.Utica, NY
Know Your Enemy

Common Pests in Upstate New York

Upstate NY's forests, older homes, and cold winters create the perfect storm for pest activity. Know what you're dealing with.

Carpenter Ants
White-Footed Mice
Deer Ticks
Stink Bugs
Yellowjackets
Spotted Lanternfly
Cluster Flies
Norway Rats
Raccoons
Subterranean Termites
View All Upstate NY Pests

Ready to Kick Pests Out for Good?

Don't wait for an infestation to get worse. Call Sasquatch Pest Control for a FREE inspection and estimate. We serve all of Upstate New York — fast, professional, and guaranteed.
